description: Share-card built around a Fox News headline. The top portion is a white band with the dark-blue 'FOX NEWS' logo and a black serif headline: 'Labor secretary announces 'strike team' going to Minnesota to investigate rampant fraud'. The lower two-thirds is a color photograph of Donald Trump in a navy suit with a purple patterned tie and American flag lapel pin, smiling and pointing at the camera, on a stage in front of a blurred crowd in red and green apparel and a blue backdrop. The white headline band has a torn-paper bottom edge transitioning into the photo. A small Department of Labor seal is at the bottom-left corner. The tweet references 'TPS Somalis' and welfare fraud in Minnesota and the phrase 'AMERICAN WORKERS ONLY'.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Labor secretary announces 'strike team' going to Minnesota to investigate rampant fraud
